description:
## What
Serve each persona's public posts as RSS 2.0 and Atom 1.0 feeds, discoverable via actor document and WebFinger.

## Why
Feed readers and aggregators can follow smallhold personas without ActivityPub support, broadening reach and interoperability.

## Phases covered
- Feed endpoints (GET /users/:username/feed.rss and .atom)
- Autodiscovery links in actor doc and WebFinger JRD
title: RSS/Atom feed per persona
